title: Viewer uses separate pages instead of drawer panels
summary: Viewer UX should avoid drawer overlays. The viewer now uses real pages for Overview, Graph, Memory, Intel, Review, and Data. Graph controls and Inspector render as normal page panels beside/below the graph; reports and t
body: Viewer UX should avoid drawer overlays. The viewer now uses real pages for Overview, Graph, Memory, Intel, Review, and Data. Graph controls and Inspector render as normal page panels beside/below the graph; reports and tables render as full page content so the interface feels like a professional repo dashboard rather than a hidden drawer.

context.fact: Viewer UX should avoid drawer overlays. The viewer now uses real pages for Overview, Graph, Memory, Intel, Review, and Data. Graph controls and Inspector render as normal page panels beside/below the graph; reports and tables render as full page content so the interface feels like a professional repo dashboard rather than a hidden drawer.
